revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-2-170

Search coil (in an inductive radiogoniometer)

A rotatable coil forming the essential moving part of the radiogoniometer and coupled to the field coils which induce voltages in it. The search coil is normally connected to a receiver.

Reference: B.S.

{{IALAFooter}}
